label: SA-9(2)
title: Identification of Functions, Ports, Protocols, and Services

prose.en: Require providers of the following external system services to identify the functions, ports, protocols, and other services required for the use of such services: {param:sa-09.02_odp}.

guidance.en: Information from external service providers regarding the specific functions, ports, protocols, and services used in the provision of such services can be useful when the need arises to understand the trade-offs involved in restricting certain functions and services or blocking certain ports and protocols.

prose.en: providers of {param:sa-09.02_odp} are required to identify the functions, ports, protocols, and other services required for the use of such services.

objects.en: supply chain risk management policy and procedures
acquisition contracts for the system, system component, or system service
organizational security requirements and security specifications for external service providers
list of required functions, ports, protocols, and other services
Organizational personnel with system and service acquisition responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities

guidelines.en: external system services that require the identification of functions, ports, protocols, and other services are defined;
